title: Notifications
subtitle: Updates from orders, staff, billing, and support
emptyUnreadDesc: No unread notifications. New updates will appear here.
emptyReadDesc: Notifications you have opened will appear in this list.
deleteConfirm: Delete this notification? This cannot be undone.
emptyDesc: When there are new updates from orders, staff, or support, they will appear here.

messages.BILLING_PAYMENT_SUCCESS: Shop "{{shopName}}" has been extended until {{untilDate}}. Payment recorded at {{paidAt}}. Current period ends: {{periodEndAt}}.
messages.BILLING_PLAN_EXPIRED: Please pay 99,000 VND to continue using all features.
messages.BILLING_PLAN_EXPIRING_SOON_TRIAL: Shop "{{shopName}}" expires on {{expiryDate}} ({{daysLeft}} days left). Please pay 99,000 VND to continue after the trial ends.
messages.BILLING_PLAN_EXPIRING_SOON_TRIAL_URGENT: Shop "{{shopName}}" expires on {{expiryDate}} (1 day left). Please pay 99,000 VND to continue after the trial ends.
messages.BILLING_PLAN_EXPIRING_SOON_ACTIVE: Shop "{{shopName}}" expires on {{expiryDate}} ({{daysLeft}} days left). Please pay 99,000 VND to renew and avoid service interruption.
messages.BILLING_PLAN_EXPIRING_SOON_ACTIVE_URGENT: Shop "{{shopName}}" expires on {{expiryDate}} (1 day left). Please pay 99,000 VND to renew and avoid service interruption.
messages.BILLING_MANUAL_TRANSFER_PENDING: Shop "{{shopName}}" ({{shopId}}) reported a bank transfer of {{amount}} VND. Reference: {{transactionId}}. Please reconcile and confirm in admin billing.
messages.STAFF_ADDED: You were added to shop "{{shopName}}" as {{roleLabel}}.
messages.STAFF_REMOVED: You are no longer a member of shop "{{shopName}}".
